fields.label: Address
fields.name: footer_address
fields.instructions: Mailing address. Each line break is preserved.

fields.label: Email
fields.name: footer_email
fields.instructions: Linked contact email displayed in the footer.

fields.label: Contact Link
fields.name: footer_contact_link
fields.instructions: Page or anchor link to the contact form.

fields.label: Tagline
fields.name: footer_tagline
fields.placeholder: e.g., Trusted guidance in the art market since 1990.

fields.label: Disclaimer
fields.name: footer_disclaimer
fields.instructions: Optional legal disclaimer. Leave empty to hide.
fields.placeholder: e.g., We do not accept artist submissions.

fields.label: ASA Profile URL
fields.name: footer_asa_url
fields.instructions: Link to the American Society of Appraisers membership or directory page.

fields.label: APAA Profile URL
fields.name: footer_apaa_url
fields.instructions: Link to the APAA directory page.

fields.label: Copyright
fields.name: footer_copyright
fields.instructions: Copyright text. Use {year} as a placeholder for the current year.
fields.default_value: {year} Cecilia Dan Fine Art. All rights reserved.
